title: Smoky Chicken Kebabs
description: A flavorful and easy-to-make kebab recipe with smoky chicken and a variety of spices.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, smoky paprika, crushed cumin, minced garlic, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes or up to 2 hours.
Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chicken is cooked through.
Transfer the kebabs to a serving platter and garnish with chopped parsley.
Serve hot, with your favorite sides.
